The 360 degree cleaning mop head of the floor spray mop won't let go any dust, and bring a tidy place

2 IN 1 Dry Mops & Wet Mops - The spray mop for hardwood floors can be used as dry mop as well as wet mop. description: Product Description ILAVCLEAN Microfiber Spray Mop for Floor Cleaning with Three Reusable Mop Pads Our brand's mission is to use high-quality materials and focus on product details, with the ultimate goal of creating a unique and comfortable cleaning experience, making household chores a breeze The slim mop pole has simple and fashionable design, while allowing you to mop the floor without bending over. Don't need leaning over a lot and fatiguing your back, which will help you reduce the possibility for back-aches. The water mist covers a large area, reducing the times of pressing the handle, saving your strength. The water mist is fine and even, protecting your floor from moisture and mildew The fine mist nozzle achieves micro wet cleaning, strictly controls the water output, which the floor can be dry immediately without leaving any water stains and saves water. The wet mop is equipped with a built-in transmission link device, which allows floor cleaning mop spray even water mist with just a slight press of the handle. Washable Reusable Mop Pads Refills for your convenience - Quickly switch between dry mopping and wet mopping Our microfiber mop pad will not cause more problem beacuse of shed hair. Plus, our reusable mop pads also compatible with swiffer power mop 3 Microfiber mop pads replacement pick up everything off the floor (like dirt, dust, pet hair, crumbs and moisture) and leave things looking very nice. So very easy to use good mop to have. spray mop can quick spills on the floor or anywhere in your home that you may need it. A multifunctional scraper can scrape out excess water and pet hair from the mop pads. In addition, its small brush can also clean the sink and bathtub glaze 360 Degree Rotation Mop Head The flexible 360 degree rotation mop head eliminates the need to move furniture, making it easy to cope with various furniture obstacles. The thin mop bottom board can perfectly clean the gaps, sofa bottom, bed bottom, table bottom, and other small spaces, ensuring that there are no dead corners during cleaning and making you feel more at ease Pratical Little Brush There is a small brush in the package, you can use it to scrape off the hair and excess water on the dirty mop pad to avoid dirtying your hands. In addition, you can use it to scrape off stubborn stains on the floor. This small brush helps you clean your home more thoroughly and leaves no place for dirt to hide. 635ML Large Capacity Water Tank Sealed water bottle, which brings you a different cleaning experience. It can be added with water, detergent, disinfectant, essential oil, perfume according to your needs. Please note that after each use, please add 1/5 of clear water to the bottle and spray it. The purpose is to clean the nozzle to prevent blocking and corrosion of the built-in transmission device [Warm Notice] Because each spray mops for floor cleaning will undergo a nozzle test before delivery, a small amount of water may remain in bottle and tube is normal phenomenon. Please clean the water tank and spray nozzle of the floor mop after use to keep it clean. Please don't fill with boiling water, strong acid, alkali detergent into the wet jet mop bottle. Please fully dilute solutions with plain water,because overly concentrated solutions may corrode mop internal parts or floor. There are two small silicone plugs on the bottle cap of our spray mop. Please be careful not to lose them when cleaning the bottle
